text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 400 

PRE_ICL_OONP_COINS_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Out-of-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1- or 3-months) on this tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the pre-initial 
coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME:
